detail.description:
Discover the Thrill of "Supreme Duelist" — The Ultimate Stickman and Stick Figure Battle!

Get ready for a fast-paced, hilarious, and easy-to-play stickman fighting game! It's the perfect blend of fun and challenge, packed with unique features:

New Modes: Enjoy a football mini-game and a challenging Boss Fight Tournament, all starring dynamic stickman and stick figure warriors.

Creative Play: Explore various maps with a new editor, unlock cool skins, and create your ultimate stickman or stick
detail.recentChanges:
New Basketball Weapon
New option for the basketball mini-game to play without weapons
